type: 学术研究总览图（research overview / framework figure for thesis defense）
goal: 生成一张可直接放进硕士开题答辩 PPT 首页的研究总览图，主题为锂电池热失控早期预警，要求正式克制、白底、工程化配色、明显论文图感，绝无商业路演感

canvas.render_quality: vector-clean look, anti-aliased edges, sharp text

title_block.main_title: 锂离子电池热失控早期预警方法研究
title_block.subtitle: Early Warning of Thermal Runaway in Lithium-ion Batteries
title_block.occasion_label: 硕士学位论文开题答辩
title_block.position: top-center, main_title in bold sans-serif 22pt, subtitle in regular 13pt below in gray, occasion_label in italic gray 10pt at top-right

background_section.label: 研究背景与问题
background_section.summary: 动力电池热失控具有突发性与高破坏性，现有预警手段以单一温度阈值为主，对早期征兆识别不足
background_section.key_question: 如何从多源传感数据中提取热失控早期可分辨特征，实现分钟级提前预警？
background_section.position: upper-middle band, full width, visually anchored as 'context'

objective_section.label: 研究目标
objective_section.summary: 构建可在分钟级提前期内稳定预警热失控的多模态早期识别方法
objective_section.position: directly below background, narrower than background, centered

items.name: 机理分析
items.summary: 梳理热-电-气三场耦合下的早期征兆链路
items.method_hint: ARC 量热实验 + 多场耦合分析

items.name: 预警模型
items.summary: 构建多源传感融合的早期识别模型

items.name: 工况验证
items.summary: 在多工况电芯与小模组上完成方法验证
items.method_hint: 针刺 / 过充 / 高温箱实验台架

research_modules.layout: horizontal row of three equal-width modules in the central band, all modules identical size and identical style

expected_outcome_section.label: 预期成果
expected_outcome_section.items: 热失控早期征兆特征库、可在线运行的早期预警模型、面向工况台架验证的方法学报告
expected_outcome_section.position: bottom band, full width, visually distinct from research_modules but stylistically consistent

module_block_style.size_per_module: all modules identical size, vertically aligned
module_block_style.fill: very light slate tint #F1F5F9 for the three research modules; very light cyan tint #ECFEFF for the outcome band
module_block_style.title_text: module name in bold sans-serif (PingFang SC / Source Han Sans), 14pt
module_block_style.summary_text: single phrase, 11pt regular, max 2 lines, no period

connectors.style: thin arrows (1.2px) with simple triangle arrowheads, dark gray #334155
connectors.rule: vertical flow background → objective → research_modules → outcomes; the three research modules are horizontally parallel with no inter-module arrows
connectors.decoration: none; no curved arcs, no dashed lines

color_palette.rule: deep blue #1E3A8A as primary, slate blue #3B82F6 as secondary, charcoal #1F2937 for text and lines; no accent color in this version

typography.rule: PingFang SC / Source Han Sans for chinese; Inter / Helvetica for english subtitle and method hints
typography.consistency: all module titles identical size; all summaries identical size; never mix serif and sans-serif

must_keep: three research modules identical size, vertically aligned, equal weight
white background, no gradient, no decorative pattern
language and font consistent across the figure (Chinese as primary, English as secondary)
summaries are short phrases, never full paragraphs
the figure must look like the cover slide of a graduate thesis defense, not a corporate roadmap or pitch deck
color palette ≤ 3 main colors, must remain readable in grayscale print
avoid: consulting / pitch-deck aesthetics, brand campaign aesthetics
decorative icons, emoji, mascots, hand-drawn wobble
3D rendering, glossy fills, lens flare, drop shadow blocks
stock-photo backgrounds, photographic battery hero images
fabricated quantitative claims (no '+30% efficiency', no '150 samples')
saturated brand colors, neon, vivid gradients
dense text walls; no module summary should exceed 2 lines
watermarks, copyright stamps, university or lab logos
